name: test_out_of_range_coordinates_returns_400[-999.0-0.0-latitude out of range (-999)]
descriptionHtml:
Coordinates outside [-90, 90] latitude or [-180, 180] longitude must
    return HTTP 400 with error=true in the response body.
    The API returns: {"reason": "Latitude must be in range ...", "error": true}
